functions.name: ovos_audio.utils.is_speaking
documentation:
Determine if Text to Speech is occurring

Returns:
    bool: True while still speaking
NOTE: nothing imports these from here, utils accidentally dragged while isolating ovos-audio

functions.name: ovos_audio.utils.wait_while_speaking
documentation:
Pause as long as Text to Speech is still happening

Pause while Text to Speech is still happening.  This always pauses
briefly to ensure that any preceeding request to speak has time to
begin.
NOTE: nothing imports these from here, utils accidentally dragged while isolating ovos-audio

functions.name: ovos_audio.utils.stop_speaking
documentation:
Stop mycroft speech.

TODO: Skills should only be able to stop speech they've initiated
NOTE: nothing imports these from here, utils accidentally dragged while isolating ovos-audio

classes.name: ovos_audio.transformers.DialogTransformersService

methods.name: ovos_audio.transformers.DialogTransformersService.plugins
documentation:
Return loaded transformers in priority order, such that modules with a
higher `priority` rank are called first and changes from lower ranked
transformers are applied last.

A plugin of `priority` 1 will override any existing context keys and
will be the last to modify `audio_data`

methods.name: ovos_audio.transformers.DialogTransformersService.shutdown
documentation: Shutdown all loaded plugins

methods.name: ovos_audio.transformers.DialogTransformersService.transform

documentation: transform dialogs before being sent to TTS

classes.name: ovos_audio.transformers.TTSTransformersService

methods.name: ovos_audio.transformers.TTSTransformersService.plugins
documentation:
Return loaded transformers in priority order, such that modules with a
higher `priority` rank are called first and changes from lower ranked
transformers are applied last.

A plugin of `priority` 1 will override any existing context keys and
will be the last to modify `audio_data`

classes.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.init
documentation: DEPRECATED! Init the TTS Playback thread.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.set_bus
documentation:
Provide bus instance to the TTS Playback thread.
Args:
    bus (MycroftBusClient): bus client

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.clear_queue
documentation: Remove all pending playbacks.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.begin_audio
documentation: Perform beginning of speech actions.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.end_audio
documentation:
Perform end of speech output actions.
Will inform the system that speech has ended and trigger the TTS's
cache checks. Listening will be triggered if requested.
Args:
    listen (bool): True if listening event should be emitted

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.run
documentation:
Thread main loop. Get audio and extra data from queue and play.

The queue messages is a tuple containing
snd_type: 'mp3' or 'wav' telling the loop what format the data is in
data: path to temporary audio data
videmes: list of visemes to display while playing
listen: if listening should be triggered at the end of the sentence.

Playback of audio is started and the visemes are sent over the bus
the loop then wait for the playback process to finish before starting
checking the next position in queue.

If the queue is empty the tts.end_audio() is called possibly triggering
listening.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.show_visemes
documentation:
Send viseme data to enclosure

Args:
    pairs (list): Visime and timing pair

Returns:
    bool: True if button has been pressed.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.pause
documentation: pause thread

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.resume
documentation: resume thread

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.clear
documentation: Clear all pending actions for the TTS playback thread.

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.blink
documentation: Blink mycroft's eyes

methods.name: ovos_audio.playback.PlaybackThread.stop
documentation: Stop thread

Thread class for playing back tts audio and sending
viseme data to enclosure.

functions.name: ovos_audio.__main__.main
documentation: Start the Audio Service and connect to the Message Bus

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.get_tts_lang_options
documentation:
returns a list of options to be consumed by an external UI
each dict contains metadata about the plugins

eg:
  [{"engine": "ovos-tts-plugin-mimic3",
  "offline": True,
  "lang": "en-us",
  "gender": "male",
  "voice": "ap",
  "display_name": "Alan Pope",
  "plugin_name": 'OVOS TTS Plugin Mimic3'}]

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.get_g2p_lang_options
documentation:
returns a list of options to be consumed by an external UI
each dict contains metadata about the plugins

eg:
  [{"engine": "ovos-g2p-plugin-mimic",
  "offline": True,
  "lang": "en-us",
  "native_alphabet": "ARPA",
  "display_name": "Mimic G2P",
  "plugin_name": 'OVOS G2P Plugin Mimic'}]

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.get_audio_options
documentation:
returns a list of options to be consumed by an external UI
each dict contains metadata about the plugins

eg:
  [{"type": "ovos_common_play",
  "active": True,
  "plugin_name": 'Ovos Common Play'}]

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_opm_tts_query
ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_opm_g2p_query
ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_opm_audio_query
ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_b64_audio
documentation:
synthesizes speech, but instead of queuing for playback
returns it b64 encoded in the bus
allows 3rd party integrations to use OVOS as a TTS service

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_speak
documentation:
Handle "speak" message

Parse sentences and invoke text to speech service.

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService._maybe_reload_tts
documentation:
Load TTS modules if not yet loaded or if configuration has changed.
Optionally pre-loads fallback TTS if configured

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.execute_tts
documentation:
Mute mic and start speaking the utterance using selected tts backend.

Args:
    utterance:  The sentence to be spoken
    ident:      Ident tying the utterance to the source query
    listen:     True if a user response is expected

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService._get_tts_fallback
documentation: Lazily initializes the fallback TTS if needed.

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.execute_fallback_tts
documentation:
Speak utterance using fallback TTS if connection is lost.

Args:
    utterance (str): sentence to speak
    ident (str): interaction id for metrics
    listen (bool): True if interaction should end with mycroft listening

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_stop
documentation:
Handle stop message.

Shutdown any speech.

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService._resolve_sound_uri
documentation: helper to resolve sound files full path

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService._path_from_hexdata
documentation:
hex_audio contains hex string encoded bytes
 audio_ext if not provided assumed to be wav

recommended encoding via binascii.hexlify(byte_data).decode('utf-8')

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_queue_audio
documentation:
Queue a sound file to play in speech thread
ensures it doesnt play over TTS

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_instant_play
documentation: play a sound file immediately (may play over TTS)

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.handle_get_languages_tts
documentation:
Handle a request for supported TTS languages
\:param message: ovos.languages.tts request

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.shutdown
documentation:
Shutdown the audio service cleanly.

Stop any playing audio and make sure threads are joined correctly.

methods.name: ovos_audio.service.PlaybackService.init_messagebus
documentation: Start speech related handlers.

classes.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    bus: Mycroft messagebus

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService.load_services
documentation:
Method for loading services.

Sets up the global service, default and registers the event handlers
for the subsystem.

Wait for services to be loaded.

Args:
    timeout (float): Seconds to wait (default 3 minutes)
Returns:
    (bool) True if loading completed within timeout, else False.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService.track_start
documentation:
Callback method called from the services to indicate start of
playback of a track or end of playlist.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._pause
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.audio.service.pause. Pauses the current audio
service.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._resume
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.audio.service.resume.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._next
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.audio.service.next. Skips current track and
starts playing the next.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._prev
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.audio.service.prev. Starts playing the previous
track.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._perform_stop
documentation: Stop audioservice if active.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._stop
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.stop. Stops any playing service.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._lower_volume_on_speak
documentation:
Is triggered when mycroft starts to speak and reduces the volume.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._restore_volume_on_speak
documentation: Triggered when OVOS is done speaking and restores the volume.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._restore_volume_on_handled
documentation:
Triggered when OVOS is done handling an utterance
(speech might still be happening)

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._lower_volume_on_record
documentation:
Is triggered when OVOS starts to record audio and reduces the volume.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._restore_volume_after_record
documentation:
Restores the volume when OVOS is done recording.
If no utterance detected, restore immediately.
If no response is made in reasonable time, then also restore.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._extract
documentation: convert uris into real streams that can be played, eg. handle youtube urls

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService.play
documentation:
play starts playing the audio on the prefered service if it
supports the uri. If not the next best backend is found.

Args:
    tracks: list of tracks to play.
    repeat: should the playlist repeat
    prefered_service: indecates the service the user prefer to play
                      the tracks.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._play
documentation:
Handler for mycroft.audio.service.play. Starts playback of a
tracklist. Also  determines if the user requested a special
service.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._track_info
documentation:
Returns track info on the message bus.

Args:
    message: message bus message, not used but required

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._list_backends
documentation: Return a dict of available backends.

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._get_track_length
documentation: getting the duration of the audio in milliseconds

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._get_track_position
documentation: get current position in milliseconds

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._set_track_position
documentation:
Handle message bus command to go to position (in milliseconds)

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._seek_forward
documentation:
Handle message bus command to skip X seconds

Args:

methods.name: ovos_audio.audio.AudioService._seek_backward
documentation:
Handle message bus command to rewind X seconds

Audio Service class.
Handles playback of audio and selecting proper backend for the uri
to be played.
